sources.name: Pathfinder #217: Death Sails a Wine-Dark Sea

text: One of the first creations of the titans. The few existing stories of their origin suggest they were created from the blood of a titan who was injured in a mighty battle. Amnerion then carved their own domain from the caves beneath Iblydos and guards it jealously.
